title: Eorl Crabtree
description: British former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s
extract:
Eorl Crabtree (born 2 October 1982) is an English former professional rugby league footballer who played in the 2000s and 2010s. He played at international level for England, and at club level in the Super League for the Huddersfield Giants, where he spent his entire club career, primarily as a prop, but also as a centre, second-row or loose forward.
He is managing director of the Midlands Hurricanes.
